steps.title: Use the OFT explanation
steps.content: The passage says optimal foraging theory explains cost-benefit trade-offs that vary by species and ecological circumstances. It then presents two species responding differently to lunar intensity.

steps.title: Reject unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice A says OFT favors benefits over costs, which the text does not say. Choice C suggests some species ignore trade-offs. Choice D treats species variation as a weakness, though the text says OFT explains it.

steps.title: Account for species differences
steps.content: Choice B follows directly: OFT can explain why different species respond differently to the same ecological circumstance, such as lunar intensity. The answer is B.
